summary: RupeeNest v1.0.0 full end-to-end verification on https://rupee-nest.preview.emergentagent.com (mobile viewport 390x844). All 17 critical user flows from the review request PASS. Fresh install is truly empty (greeting 'Friend', all tiles ₹0, 'No transactions yet'). Add-Income (Salary ₹50,000 → Balance ₹50,000, Income tile ₹50K) and Add-Expense (Swiggy ₹1,200 → Balance ₹48,800, Expenses tile ₹1.2K) work correctly. Edit (1200→1500) reflects on list as -₹1,500 and Budget Spent updates to ₹1.5K / Used 4%. Search 'salary' filters list to Salary row only; search-clear restores. Filter chips income/expense/all all toggle correctly. Budget edit to ₹40,000 persists, By-Category shows Food & Dining ₹1.5K. Reports renders Income/Expenses/Savings% KPI tiles, 6-month Jan-Jun bar chart with Income/Expenses legend, and Top Spending Categories. Dark Mode toggle switches surfaces; toggle back to Light works. Persistence verified via page.reload(): balance ₹50,000, budget ₹40,000 retained. Clear-data via settings cog resets app to empty state. Settings → About RupeeNest row displays 'v1.0.0' exactly. Icons render correctly (no tofu boxes) across tab bar, FAB, category chips, settings cog, dark-mode glyph. ZERO console error-level messages and no red error overlay during the full run. App is release-ready for the v1.0.0 Android build.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Verified that the sample-data seeder was indeed removed - a fresh install (after localStorage.clear() + reload) is fully empty as required for v1.0.0 release.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Note: detail bottom-sheet only opens when clicking the row container via [data-testid="tx-row-<index>"] - clicking via inner text/name does not trigger onPress. Always resolve the row index by iterating rows and matching merchant text. Native browser confirm() is used for Delete - register page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) before clicking tx-delete-btn. After reload Expo Router restores last active tab, so click tab-dashboard explicitly before reading dashboard-* testIDs.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All 17 acceptance criteria from the verification checklist passed cleanly: empty-state, add income, add expense, edit, delete, search, 3 filters, dashboard totals, budget set + spent tracking, reports KPIs+chart+top categories, dark theme toggle, persistence after reload, clear-data empty states, icon glyphs, no console errors, v1.0.0 marker.
